Popular confidence pass BK 2026-06-02: Discover Kynouria directly supports Atsinganos as a well-known Kynouria beach with sand and pebbles, trees along the beach setting, shallow warm water with depth increasing around five metres from shore, an organized section with umbrellas, loungers, WC, showers, bins and waste baskets, lifeguard base, refreshment stand, racket/football areas, vehicle parking at the southern end and sailing availability. The official Blue Flag 2026 awards page lists Atsinganos in Arkadia / North Kynouria. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; unsupported taverna/cafe-nearby wording was replaced with the directly supported refreshment-stand and parking context. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.
